feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Indrajeet (1991)
entry.content: In order to continue suppressing the workers in his company; multi-millionaire, Din Dayal gets a union leader and his wife murdered. When inspector Indrajeet attempts to arrest Dayal his daughter, Shanti intervenes. This angers Indrajeet whose beloved is also Shanti and he decides to cut all connections from her. Indrajeet adopts the daughter, Neelu of the diseased union leader and years later after his retirement from police service attempts to bring her up. Indrajeet gets Neelu marry to Vijay

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I've realized that there's a better way for humans. If I'm to condense the main …
entry.content: I've realized that there's a better way for humans. If I'm to condense the main point of these ideas into a few words it may be "together we're better". If they think about it, I'm sure anyone would admit and agree that it's by working together we have achieved what we have, going to the moon, curing diseases, or just having easy access to food. No man could achieve alone what we can together. That is the core strength of humanity. We developed language to communicate so we can work together. Bu

entry.title: /o/ Auto: GM Van body swap
entry.content: >be a GMT610 >be body on frame >frame How many have tried swapping out the van body for truck body or even a car body. Pic related: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i9z zNoVN0bo

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Toyotas are not as good as this broad hypes
entry.content: I bought a 22 Camry 1.5 years ago and its just dogshit. I know people here will pay $50k for a Toyota if it runs but it's ridiculous. My AC has a high pitch whistle if I go any higher than level 2. I can't afford a $200+ diagnostic fee at the dealer. Plastic parts snap like it's an old 90s car. I barely drive this car. It has under 25,000 miles with several broken plastic pieces. I'm not hard on cars as I'm a car enthusiast. I bet money that my GMT 800 would last longer than this piece of shit.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: After a long time, I finally started to fall in love again after my breakup. He …
entry.content: After a long time, I finally started to fall in love again after my breakup. He rejected me though. He said I wasn't his type, but I wish he had just lied and said something else. It felt like he was calling me ugly. It felt SAVAGE, but I know it was unintentional. I'm 35, by the way. So it hurts even more.

entry.title: /news/ News: Federal judge blocks Idaho's 'transgender bathroom law' as legal challenge continues
entry.content: https://idahonews.com/news/local/fe deral-judge-blocks-idahos-transgend er-bathroom-law-as-legal-challenge- continues A federal judge on Tuesday granted a request for a preliminary injunction blocking enforcement of H.B. 752, a new Idaho law that would have threatened transgender people with up to five years in prison for using public restrooms consistent with their gender identity instead of their biological sex at birth. H.B. 752 had been set to take effect July 1. The court’s order limits enf

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump empties Florida's Alligator Alcatraz amid soaring costs, disaster threat
entry.content: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/arti cles/2026-06-17/trump-empties-flori da-s-alligator-alcatraz-amid-soarin g-costs https://www.cbsnews.com/news/detain ees-moved-out-of-alligator-alcatraz -over-hurricane-concerns/ U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement has moved detainees out of a controversial detention center in the Florida Everglades known as "Alligator Alcatraz," an ICE spokesperson told CBS News, citing safety concerns around hurricane season. "For the safety of the illegal alien detainee

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Cross-Country
entry.content: Between the northern route through Cleveland, Detroit and Chicago, or the middle route going through Indianapolis, St. Louis and Kansas City, which one will be less likely to get my shit stolen?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: BMW Collapsing (Mostly Due to China)
entry.content: >stock fell 7% after 1st quarter earnings report >BMW sales went from 800k in 2021 (peak) to 40k in 2025 (record low) >Iran War drove European buyers to consider cheaper alternative EV models >Mercedes-Benz went from 13% profit margin per car in 2021 to 3-5% profit margin per car in 2026 >BMW fell from 10% profit to 1-3% profit in the same period >BMW to cut production capacity 15% this year >massive layoffs by year end possible What now? Such a great company... reduced to this?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 2009+ MX-5 NC vs 2017+ Renault Twingo III GT
entry.content: Need a car that can be both fun and dailyable since I need it to get to work daily. I found these two to be at my price range, and I would like to ask for your personal /o/pinion. Twingo: +Great fuel ecenomy +Newer +Pretty reliable +Peppy rear engine rwd hatch +OK power to weight -Common electrical issues -A more basic driving experince and looks like basic traffic -0.9 is small displacement even though it's turbo 110hp NC: +Maximum style and vibe +160 hp with small weight +Sporty feel and real

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm honestly surprised by how many people got filtered by this game. There are s…
entry.content: I'm honestly surprised by how many people got filtered by this game. There are some persons out there that I thought had pretty good taste when it comes to consuming media, but they disregard TCOAAL as being nothing gooner filth just because of the touchy subject it has, even though the actual story of the game and the relationship between Andrew and Ashley is genuinely very compelling.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Kemono
entry.content: Where is the replacement?? Just vibe code it. Piracy is doing better than ever before, nobody cares about 'piracy bad' moral argument anymore and vibe coding went so far we get pirate streaming sites that look better than netflix and offer better content in better quality. Even denuvo games are getting cracked again with 2 methods. All this and nobody has done simple kemono replacement?

entry.title: /int/ International: What is the average New Yorker like?
entry.content: My mental image of a New Yorker is a gruff 3rd generation italian or polish American wearing a flat cap, smokes like a chimney while drinking coffee as black as tar, has a raspy voice and says "Ayy I'm walkin' ere, fuggeddabboutit" and works some blue collar job. Is that accurate?

entry.content: >lust inducing image I'd like to talk about non-chromium browsers, since Zen finally crossed the line for me yesterday. I understand there's not much choice, however I'd like to hear other anons opinions and advice. >Vanilla Firefox Too bloated. If I see Pocket shilled one more time, I'll hurt someone. >Waterfox First contender. >LibreWolf Second contender. entry.title: /g/ Technology: /asdiq/ Archiving, storage tech, development, in-depth history/analysis, and questions general
entry.content: CURRENT EVENT: archive.today is owned by a jihadist or some shit. This is a general which is focused on archiving, but also interested in other related topics. Storage technology and file sharing: Hardware, software, services, shadow libraries, backups, home server, and networks such as tape drives, HDDs, file systems, archive.today, IPFS, Arweave, BitTorrent, etc. Development: E.g.: web archiving is much harder in 2026 compared to 2016. Too many websites are walled off by systems such as Cl0udf
